checks.reason: The node is scoped to eyed needles beginning around 40,000 cal BP at Denisova Cave.
The scoped artifacts are bone, antler, or ivory eyed needles.
Thread or sinew enables sewing but is not the needle artifact itself.
The scoped artifacts are bone-tool forms and predate the current advanced_stone_tools placeholder.
Eyed needles should not depend directly on basketry.
Barbed fish hooks should not depend directly on eyed sewing needles.
